rules.rule_text:
title: MEGA Exfiltration
id: af71437b-430e-4aad-bbf8-b787c426dc7d
description: Large upload towards MEGA, may indicate exfiltration of data
references:
- https://arista.my.site.com/AristaCommunity/s/article/Forensic-Investigation-of-the-MEGAcmd-Client#Comm_Kna_ka02I000000brf8QAA_92
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: '2024-02-16'
modified: '2024-03-04'
logsource:
  category: firewall
detection:
  selection_mega:
  - dest_ip:
    - 2a0b:e40:1:*
    - 2a0b:e41:1:*
    - 2a0b:e42:1:*
    - 2a0b:e43:1:*
    - 2a0b:e44:1:*
    - 2a0b:e45:1:*
    - 2a09:a380:*
    - 31.216.145.*
    - 31.216.148.*
    - 69.30.89.*
    - 89.44.168.*
    - 94.24.36.*
    - 94.24.37.*
    - 103.99.35.*
    - 162.208.16.*
    - 185.206.24.*
    - 185.206.25.*
    - 185.206.26.*
    - 185.206.27.*
    - 2001:67c:1998:*
    - 2001:678:25c:*
    - 2001:df1:e7c0:*
    - 66.181.163.241
    - 122.56.56.205
    - 122.56.56.207
    - 2403:9800:c020::13
    - 2403:9800:c020::14
    - 2405:5700:1:381::4
  - dest_host|endswith: userstorage.mega.co.nz
  - app_name:
    - Mega
    - mega-base
  selection_large_upload:
    bytes_out|gt: 10000000
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Non-sensitive file sharing
level: high
tags:
- attack.exfiltration
- attack.t1567
